audit_items.proof_trace: __damon_pa_prepare_access_check() makes no dynamic memory allocations (kmalloc/kzalloc/vmalloc/etc.) — it only calls damon_rand() (a pure integer computation) and damon_pa_mkold(). The page reference acquired inside damon_pa_mkold() via damon_get_page() is released via folio_put() on every code path (NULL early-return, goto out on unmapped/trylock-fail, and normal path all reach out: folio_put(folio) at L62-63). The property's precondition is never satisfied.
